metadata.title: Rock Me Amadeus
metadata.lyrics:
[00:02.67] Rock me, rock me, rock me, rock me, rock me, Amadeus
[00:08.23] 
[00:24.59] Rock me all the time to the top
[00:26.61] Er war ein Punker und er lebte in der großen Stadt
[00:29.27] Es war in Wien, war Vienna, wo er alles tat
[00:32.11] Er hatte Schulden, denn er trank, doch ihn liebten alle Frauen
[00:35.25] Und jede rief: "Yeah, Come on and rock me, Amadeus"
[00:37.65] Er war Superstar, er war populär
[00:40.15] Er war so exaltiert, because er hatte Flair
[00:42.97] Er war ein Virtuose, war 'n Rockidol
[00:45.88] Und alles rief: "Yeah, come and rock me, Amadeus"
[00:48.75] Amadeus, Amadeus, Amadeus
[00:51.47] Amadeus, Amadeus, Amadeus
[00:54.08] Amadeus, Amadeus
[00:55.79] Oh, oh, oh, Amadeus
[00:58.03] Come and rock me, Amadeus
[00:59.34] Amadeus, Amadeus, Amadeus
[01:02.08] Amadeus, Amadeus, Amadeus
[01:04.76] Amadeus, Amadeus
[01:06.72] Oh, oh, oh, Amadeus (ey!)
[01:10.17] Es war um siebzehn-hundert-achtzig und es war in Wien
[01:12.83] No plastic money anymore, die Banken gegen ihn
[01:15.76] Woher die Schulden kamen, war wohl jedermann bekannt
[01:18.31] Er war ein Mann der Frauen, Frauen liebten seinen Punk
[01:21.08] Er war Superstar, er war so populär
[01:23.84] Er war zu exaltiert, genau das war sein Flair
[01:26.36] Er war ein Virtuose, war 'n Rockidol
[01:29.37] Und alles ruft noch heute: "Come and rock me, Amadeus"
[01:31.91] Amadeus, Amadeus, Amadeus
[01:34.79] Amadeus, Amadeus, Amadeus
[01:37.33] Amadeus, Amadeus
[01:39.32] Oh, oh, oh, Amadeus
[01:41.57] Oh, come and rock me, Amadeus
[01:43.02] Amadeus, Amadeus, Amadeus
[01:45.53] Amadeus, Amadeus, Amadeus
[01:48.25] Amadeus, Amadeus
[01:50.23] Oh, oh, oh, Amadeus
[01:52.39] Come and rock me, Amadeus
[01:55.54] 
[02:03.40] Oh, come and rock me, Amadeus
[02:12.71] 
[02:15.49] Amadeus, Amadeus, Amadeus
[02:18.27] Amadeus, Amadeus, Amadeus
[02:20.87] Amadeus, Amadeus
[02:22.73] Oh, oh, oh, Amadeus (come and rock me, Amadeus)
[02:26.14] Amadeus, Amadeus, Amadeus
[02:29.05] Amadeus, Amadeus, Amadeus
[02:31.82] Amadeus, Amadeus
[02:33.67] Oh, oh, oh, Amadeus (Amadeus, Amadeus)
[02:37.68] (Amadeus, Amadeus)
[02:45.10] (Ama-ama-ama-amadeus)
[02:52.54] (Ama-ama-amadeus)
[02:57.77] 
[03:04.31] Oh, come and, come and rock me, Amadeus
[03:11.27] 
[03:15.07] Amadeus (-deus, -deus, -deus, -deus, -deus, -deus, -deus, -deus, -deus, -deus)
